name: §6Ocelot
description:
§8Foraging Pet

§7Ferocity: §c[Ferocity]
§7Speed: §f50

§6Foraging Wisdom Boost
§7Grants §3+30☯ Foraging Wisdom§7.

§6Tree Hugger
§7Foraging minions work §a30% §7faster
§7while on your island

§6Tree Essence
§7Gain a §a30% §7chance to get exp from
§7breaking a log

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Jungle Ocelot Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aOcelot§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
